hypothesis: Peer-relative cash return-on-assets ranked over a full year captures persistent quality with very low turnover. Annual fundamental rank is the highest-fitness operator pattern.
Operating margin improvement smoothed via decay captures earnings-quality recovery with minimal position churn. Decay wrapper on fundamental delta is the key fitness booster.
Sector-relative medium-term price momentum blended with analyst estimate revision. Slow ts_rank window (126 days) on returns keeps turnover in the 8-12% range for high fitness.
Volume-weighted short-term reversal smoothed with decay to prevent over-trading. Raw reversal signals have terrible fitness; decay wrapper brings turnover from 60% to ~12%.
